---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: "."
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
---

This is my very first blog post! I'm excited to share my thoughts and experiences here.

## Getting Started

You can add more posts by creating new `.qmd` files in the `blog/` directory. Remember to include the YAML front matter at the top of each post with `title`, `author`, `date`, and `categories`.
